title: cymbidium borneense
intro: Cymbidium borneense, also known as the Borneo cymbidium or Borneo orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Borneo. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cymbidium borneense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
